summary: Tested Admin Users management endpoints and Admin Dashboard metrics. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI for Admin Dashboard and Admin Users page working correctly with all metrics, date range selector, and user management features.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin login returns 'access_token' (not 'token') - frontend correctly uses this
verify_admin_token correctly accepts both traditional and Google tokens (type='admin_google')
Revenue endpoints return $0 as expected since no Mercado Pago subscriptions exist yet
seed_data_creation: Test user created via grant-access endpoint with email pattern TEST_grant_user_*@example.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel fully functional. Dashboard shows: Ingresos ($0), Suscripciones Activas (11), Total Usuarios (29). Monthly chart shows 6 months. Users page shows table with pagination. All admin endpoints working: /api/admin/users (list), /stats, /revenue/summary, /revenue/monthly, /grant-access, /{user_id}/extend-access, /{user_id}/revoke-access.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/admin/users: PASS - List users with pagination, search, status filter

frontend_ui.Admin Dashboard metrics cards: PASS - Shows Ingresos, Suscripciones Activas, Nuevas Suscripciones, Total Usuarios
frontend_ui.Date range selector: PASS - 7 options: Hoy, Últimos 7 días, Este mes, Mes anterior, Últimos 3 meses, Últimos 6 meses, Este año
frontend_ui.Monthly revenue chart: PASS - Bar chart showing last 6 months
frontend_ui.Subscription breakdown cards: PASS - By status (Activas, Inactivas, Canceladas, Expiradas) and by type (Mercado Pago, Acceso Manual)
frontend_ui.Admin Users table: PASS - Displays users with Estado, Tipo, Plan, Vence, Registro columns
frontend_ui.Grant Access dialog: PASS - Opens with email, name, duration fields
frontend_ui.Search and filters: PASS - Search input and status dropdown working
frontend_ui.Refresh button: PASS - Updates stats with toast notification
